fixes.details: Render-blocking CSS delaying FCP
fixes.action: Inline critical CSS, defer non-critical
Optimize hero images, implement lazy loading, reduce server response

fixes.details: Many URLs missing lastmod or have stale dates
fixes.action: Add accurate lastmod on content update

fixes.details: Category and paginated pages missing self-referencing canonicals
fixes.action: Add <link rel="canonical" href="self-url"> to all pages

fixes.details: Page 2+ canonical to page 1 instead of self
fixes.action: Each page should self-canonical; use rel=next/prev for pagination

fixes.details: 15 area pages have < 200 words, template content
fixes.action: Add 800+ words unique local content per area

fixes.details: Verify /rentals/, /blog/, /cities/ not blocked
fixes.action: Check robots.txt for accidental blocks

fixes.details: Category filters may create infinite URLs
fixes.action: Implement rel=nofollow or block in robots.txt

fixes.details: Some category pages missing self-referencing canonicals
fixes.action: Add self-referencing canonical to all pages

fixes.details: Category pagination may need rel=next/prev or canonical to page 1
fixes.action: Implement proper pagination signals

fixes.details: Filter/sort parameters creating duplicate content
fixes.action: Configure parameter handling in GSC or use canonicals

fixes.details: Static assets missing long-term cache headers
fixes.action: Add Cache-Control: max-age=31536000 for static assets

fixes.details: Images not served via CDN
fixes.action: Implement Cloudflare/CloudFront for image delivery

fixes.details: Some buttons/links < 48x48px on mobile
fixes.action: Ensure all interactive elements >= 48x48px
Set width/height on images, reserve space for ads/embeds

fixes.details: Some Product schemas missing required fields (offers, aggregateRating)
fixes.action: Run through Google Rich Results Test for all page types

fixes.details: Missing new local area pages, blog posts from last 30 days
fixes.action: Auto-generate sitemap on content publish

fixes.details: Filter/sort URLs should canonical to clean version
fixes.action: Canonical filter URLs to base category URL

fixes.details: 3 redirect chains detected (A->B->C)
fixes.action: Update redirects to point directly to final destination

fixes.details: 12 internal links returning 404
fixes.action: Fix or remove broken internal links

fixes.details: 5 external links returning 404
fixes.action: Update or remove broken external links

fixes.details: Similar content on /rentals/bike/ and /rentals/bike/hyderabad/
fixes.action: Add unique local content to area pages

fixes.details: Similar rental items with nearly identical descriptions
fixes.action: Add unique specs, features, use cases per item

fixes.details: 5 category pages have < 300 words
fixes.action: Add 500+ words of unique content per category

fixes.details: 8 rental item pages have < 400 words
fixes.action: Expand descriptions with specs, features, use cases
